title: Code and data for: Quantitative Modelling of Marine Seismic Hazard Chains: Topology, Core Amplification Nodes, and Implications
description: Reproducibility deposit for the NHESS manuscript by Shi, Hu and Zhang. A single R Markdown document (reproduce.Rmd) regenerates every table and figure of the paper from the raw documented cascade tables: the marine seismic hazard-chain network (39 nodes / 152 directed edges from 366 documented chains under 58 tsunami source events), the mainland-China comparison at a unified 15-class resolution, the robustness checks (event-level cluster bootstrap, edge-frequency thresholds, sampling sufficiency), the out-of-sample hindcast against three independent events, and the data of the interactive network viewer.
